short.stringValue:
The browser is the ultimate canvas for modern innovation.

Greetings from Gradient!

Gradient on account of Open Source Week is excited to present Browser Battle in collaboration with Pentagram.

Browser Battle is a high-energy hackathon where teams create impactful browser-based solutions in Fintech and Healthtech using modern web technologies, AI, and automation.

Date: 30 May 2026
Time: 4:30 PM
Venue: AIML Lab, 7th Floor, PJA Block, Bengaluru
Team Size: 2-4 members

Gradient Members: ₹100
Non Gradient Members: ₹150
Register here: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScArbZ-qv0XDQCOHXv-meM9TuXkP7wR9Qzr4IfzS0lKQc9d9A/viewform

Contact: Vaibhav (9481149729) and Rahul (9035059729).

long.stringValue:
The best way to predict the future is to build it directly within the browser.

Greetings from Gradient!

Gradient on account of Open Source Week is excited to present Browser Battle in collaboration with Pentagram.

Browser Battle is a competitive innovation hackathon where teams battle to build the most creative and practical web applications within 24 to 36 hours. Participants can choose between the Fintech track, focusing on solutions like smart payments and fraud detection, or the Healthtech track, which covers AI health assistants and fitness tracking. Teams will pitch their projects to judges and compete for prestigious titles including Best Browser Innovation, Most Impactful Solution, Best UI/UX, and the AI Powerhouse Award.

Date: 30 May 2026
Time: 4:30 PM
Venue: AIML Lab, 7th Floor, PJA Block, Bengaluru
Team Size: 2-4 members

Gradient Members: ₹100
Non Gradient Members: ₹150
Register here: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScArbZ-qv0XDQCOHXv-meM9TuXkP7wR9Qzr4IfzS0lKQc9d9A/viewform

Contact: Vaibhav (9481149729) and Rahul (9035059729).

Event Permission Letter (To Principal/Ho.stringValue:
[DATE]

To,
[Recipient Name/Title]
[Department/Organization]
[Address]

Respected Sir/Ma'am,

Subject: **Request for Event Permission Letter (To Principal/HoD) regarding Browser Battle**

We are writing on behalf of Gradient to formally request Event Permission Letter (To Principal/HoD) for our upcoming event, Browser Battle. The event is designed around the theme of "A professional club gathering.", to promote engagement and practical learning among the student body. 

We require the necessary permissions and resources to ensure the successful execution of this event. Detailed logistical requirements and schedules will be shared with your office well in advance. We assure you that all activities will strictly adhere to the institution's guidelines and no property will be damaged.

Thank you for your continuous support and understanding.

Sincerely,

Faculty Coordinator / Chapter Advisor
Gradient


[Name]                   [Name]                       [Name]               [Name]              [Name]                 [Name]
Chairperson              Vice Chairperson             Treasurer            Secretary           Joint Secretary        Joint Secretary

Gradient Executive Committee 2025-26

description.stringValue:
“Build the Future Through the Browser”

A high-energy hackathon where participants create impactful browser-based solutions that solve real-world problems in Fintech and Healthtech using modern web technologies, AI, and automation.

Short Event Idea

Browser Battle is a competitive innovation hackathon where teams battle to build the most creative and practical web applications within 24–36 hours. Participants choose between two tracks:

Fintech Track → Smart payments, budgeting, fraud detection, investing, financial literacy, banking tools, etc.
Healthtech Track → AI health assistants, fitness tracking, mental wellness, telemedicine, health monitoring, etc.

Teams pitch their projects to judges, compete in mini browser challenges, and battle for titles like:

Best Browser Innovation
Most Impactful Solution
Best UI/UX
AI Powerhouse Award
